name: Icon List Split
description: A two-column layout that pairs descriptive content with organized icon lists, perfect for professional service firms and B2B companies showcasing their key features, services, or step-by-step processes.

descriptions.descriptive: Clean two-column layout featuring organized icon-text pairs with generous white space. Icons are simple line-style graphics paired with concise headings and descriptions. The minimal aesthetic uses subtle typography hierarchy and restrained color palette to create an uncluttered, systematic presentation that feels orderly and refined.
descriptions.usage: Perfect for showcasing service offerings, key features, or step-by-step processes where each item needs equal visual weight. Use when you have 4-8 related items that benefit from scannable organization and want users to quickly grasp multiple value propositions or workflow stages without overwhelming detail.
descriptions.audienceFit: Ideal for B2B companies, professional services firms, SaaS platforms, and established businesses targeting corporate decision-makers. Appeals to audiences who value efficiency and clarity over flashy design, particularly in consulting, finance, technology, and healthcare sectors where credibility and systematic presentation matter most.
